transcript: You have rabbit? You have? You want to sell rabbit?
Bring it. We buy from you. Are you the one who brought the rabbits last time?
40? No, I don’t have 40 now but I can get you 40 maybe in… Thursday.
Okay, you, uh… the Polish guy? The one who… brought us the rabbits last time? Did you bring us rabbits before?
Yeah, I do have rabbits, yeah. How many you want, sir?
Okay, you said you have rabbits, right?
You tell me how many you want and how much you get— Did you get rabbits from us before?
Uh… I don’t know. There is, uhh… a guy who brings me rabbits. Uh… I’m trying to see if you’re the one. Did you bring rabbits, there, to us before?
Maybe my uncle, he bring it—the rabbits to you guys before.
The big one? Very very big one? [laughs]
